General.Name: Exel Industries
General.Description: EXEL Industries SA engages in the manufacture and sale of agricultural spraying equipment in France and internationally. The company offers industrial spraying products under the Sames brand; technical hoses under the Tricoflex brand; garden products, such as watering and micro-irrigation, natural gardening, weeding, garden spraying, leisure, and hand-held garden tools under the Hozelock, Berthoud, G.F., Cooper Pegler, Laser Industrie, and Duchesnay brands; and ocean-going sailboats, powerboats, and daysailers under the Wauquiez, Rhéa Marine, and Tofinou brands. It also sells trailed, mounted, and self-propelled agricultural sprayers under the Berthoud, Tecnoma, Nicolas, CMC, Hardi, Evrard, Matrot, Agrifac, Apache, and Exxact Robotics brands; and sugar beet harvesters, diggers, and multi-purpose trucks under the Holmer and CAPAGRI brand. The company serves crops, viticulture, arboriculture, agriculture, construction and earthworks, automotive, energy, industry, transport, wood, harvesting of sugar beets and other roots, spreading, water transfer, food products and cleaning, drinking water, agricultural spraying, paints, compressed air, firefighting, vacuuming, public, and boating sectors. EXEL Industries SA was incorporated in 1952 and is headquartered in Épernay, France.
